nasb.text: The foremen of the sons of Israel saw that they were in trouble because they were told, “You must not reduce your daily amount of bricks.”

esv.text: The foremen of the people of Israel saw that they were in trouble when they said, “You shall by no means reduce your number of bricks, your daily task each day.”

cnv.text: 以色列人的首領因有命令說：“你們每天本分要做的磚數不可減少”，就知道自己有禍了。

ccb.text: 以色列人的工头听见每天做的砖数不可减少，就知道情况不妙。
